purpose: Structured request/receipt contract so a human OR an AI can propose, run, and interpret One-Wave lattice experiments seamlessly and reproducibly. Enforces the D-412 rule: simulation state -> measured fields -> visualization; never a desired picture pretending to be evidence.

hypothesis.description: What the run is expected to show, stated BEFORE running (D-412 discipline).

engine.description: Which governed engine to run. Only D-413 is runnable at Stage 01.

native_dimension.description: A-117 dimensional declaration for the run. D-413 is native 2D.

cases.description: One or more parameter sets to evolve. Each becomes one evolved state + receipt.

parameters.description: Overrides to the D-413 P dataclass (spring, well_depth, asymmetry, spin_coupling, pressure, ...). Omitted keys use canonical defaults.

initial.description: Shell initial condition Q (x, y, vx, vy, theta, omega). If omitted, an auto orbit condition is derived.

falsifiers.description: Conditions that would make the hypothesis WRONG. Required by D-412.

status.description: Claim gate. D-413 stays YELLOW: imposed well, collective-coordinate shell.

items.description: Per-case D-412 Required Measurements computed from the evolved state.

csv.description: Relative path to raw per-step results

checks.description: D-412 Required Failure/Control tests as boolean results.

interpretation.description: Human/AI reading of the result, kept SEPARATE from raw output per D-412.
